title: Concrete Heat Rising
summary: A slow-burning groove ignites into a sweat-drenched peak-hour assault, moving from hypnotic low-energy loops through driving basslines into full-throttle tech house euphoria.

tracks.title: Stalker
tracks.transition: ride the looped hi-hat tail for 16 bars, bring in track 2 with a slow high-pass filter open over the breakdown, swap kicks on the downbeat

tracks.title: The Morning After
tracks.transition: let the rolling bassline breathe for 8 bars together, cut track 2 low-end with EQ and blend into track 3 bass on the 32-bar phrase end

tracks.title: Losing It
tracks.transition: use the crowd-building vocal chop as a cue, apply a rising filter sweep on both decks through the breakdown, drop track 4 kicks hard on the chorus hit

tracks.title: Buggin
tracks.transition: layer both tracks on the groove for 16 bars, isolate track 4 mids and sidechain duck, then slam in track 5 full mix on the drop with reverb tail cut

tracks.title: Tribesmen
tracks.transition: ride the tribal percussion loop in a 32-bar extended mix, strip back to kick and hi-hat only, then open track 6 full frequency on the phrase turn

title: Sundowners Over Lagos
summary: A warm, hypnotic Afro House journey that eases into golden-hour groove, lifts through two peak moments of tribal percussion and vocal euphoria, then settles back into a soulful, swaying close.

tracks.title: Drive (feat. David Guetta & Delilah Montagu)
tracks.transition: let the vocal breathe into the breakdown, then slowly high-pass the bass and ride the ambient tail before dropping the kick of track 2 underneath at bar 64

tracks.title: Flute of the Ancestors
tracks.transition: blend the flute motif against the departing vocal chop; use a long low-pass sweep over 16 bars to hand off the rhythmic energy cleanly into the rising percussion of track 3

tracks.title: 10 Missed Calls (feat. Jozzy)
tracks.transition: keep the groove locked in the loop, drop the bass on track 3's chorus and punch in the full mix; exit on the breakdown and use a filter sweep downward to soften into track 4

tracks.title: Spiritual (feat. Ami Faku)
tracks.transition: ride the gospel vocal outro of track 4 against the incoming pad of track 5; swap kick drums at bar 32 and let the two atmospheres overlap for a full 8 bars before pulling track 4 out

tracks.title: Far Away
tracks.transition: peak the energy on the main drop, then slowly roll off the high-end with a resonant filter as the track moves into its percussive breakdown; nudge EQ mids up on track 6 before bringing in its full mix

tracks.title: We Dance Again (feat. Nakhane Toure)
tracks.transition: final track — let the warm bass and iconic vocal carry the rooftop to a natural close; no hard mix out, ride the outro and fade gracefully over the last 32 bars

title: Iron Sky Ascension
summary: A relentless climb from driving industrial groove through euphoric peak-time fury, finishing with a controlled but devastating hammer blow.

tracks.title: Your Mind Is a Box (Let Us Fill It with Wonder)
tracks.transition: ride the long outro groove, low-pass filter down to 2 kHz, blend kicks at bar 32, lift filter on incoming track's first breakdown

tracks.title: Doppler
tracks.transition: match the hypnotic mid-range loop, cut bass on outgoing track at the drop, let Doppler's bass punch through clean, quick EQ swap on the kick

tracks.title: Exhale
tracks.transition: use Exhale's rising tension breakdown to layer over Doppler's outro, swap on the snare roll, push high-pass filter out fully as the main lead hits

tracks.title: Anything
tracks.transition: blend over 16 bars using the shared industrial kick texture, slam the bass cut on Exhale at the drop, let SPFDJ's distorted lead tear through with no EQ cushion

tracks.title: Machines of Loving Grace
tracks.transition: hold both kicks for 8 bars in a dirty double-deck layered drop, strip Anything's top end with a high-pass sweep and let Machines' arpeggio melody dominate, no volume drop
